message.content:
on the first page, add: 🏠 Home Screen Contents
📌 Header Section

App name / logo
Today's date and day of week (e.g. "Saturday, March 28")
A greeting or status line (e.g. "You have 3 events today")

⏱️ Next Event Banner

A highlighted card showing the very next upcoming class or bus
Displays: title, time, location, and a live countdown (e.g. "in 23 minutes")
This is the most important element — make it big and visible

📋 Today's Event List

A scrollable list of all remaining events for today, sorted by time
Each list item shows:

🚌 or 📚 icon (bus vs class)
Event title
Time
Location (if set)
Reminder status (bell icon — on or off)


Past events can be greyed out or hidden

➕ Quick Add Button

A floating action button (FAB) at the bottom right
Tapping it opens the Add/Edit Entry screen

🔔 Notification Status Indicator

A small icon or banner showing whether reminders are globally enabled or disabled
Tapping it links to the Notification Settings screen

file.content:
package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens

import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.DateRange
import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp
import java.time.LocalDate
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter

@Composable
fun HomeScreen() {
    val today = LocalDate.now()
    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEEE, MMMM d")
    val formattedDate = today.format(dateFormatter)

    // Placeholder event count — will be dynamic once data layer is added
    val eventCount = 3

    Column(
        modifier = Modifier
            .fillMaxSize()
            .padding(horizontal = 24.dp, vertical = 32.dp),
        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.Start
    ) {
        // App logo + name
        Row(
            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
        ) {
            Icon(
                imageVector = Icons.Default.DateRange,
                contentDescription = "App logo",
                tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
                modifier = Modifier.size(36.dp)
            )
            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(10.dp))
            Text(
                text = "CombinedSchedule",
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
                fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
            )
        }

        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(28.dp))

        // Today's date
        Text(
            text = formattedDate,
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
        )

        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))

        // Greeting / status line
        Text(
            text = "You have $eventCount events today",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
        )

        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(24.dp))

        HorizontalDivider()
    }
}

toolUseResult.originalFile:
package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens

import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.DateRange
import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp
import java.time.LocalDate
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter

@Composable
fun HomeScreen() {
    val today = LocalDate.now()
    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEEE, MMMM d")
    val formattedDate = today.format(dateFormatter)

    // Placeholder event count — will be dynamic once data layer is added
    val eventCount = 3

    Column(
        modifier = Modifier
            .fillMaxSize()
            .padding(horizontal = 24.dp, vertical = 32.dp),
        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.Start
    ) {
        // App logo + name
        Row(
            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
        ) {
            Icon(
                imageVector = Icons.Default.DateRange,
                contentDescription = "App logo",
                tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
                modifier = Modifier.size(36.dp)
            )
            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(10.dp))
            Text(
                text = "CombinedSchedule",
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
                fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
            )
        }

        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(28.dp))

        // Today's date
        Text(
            text = formattedDate,
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
        )

        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))

        // Greeting / status line
        Text(
            text = "You have $eventCount events today",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
        )

        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(24.dp))

        HorizontalDivider()
    }
}

content.text:
The home screen now has all the requested sections. Here's what was added:

**Header Section**
- App logo + "CombinedSchedule" name on the left
- Notification bell icon on the right (taps to Notification Settings)
- Today's date (e.g. "Monday, March 30") and status line ("You have 3 events remaining today")

**Next Event Banner**
- Large `primaryContainer` card with rounded corners and elevation
- "UP NEXT" label + live countdown chip (e.g. "in 23 min", "in 1h 15m")
- Bus 🚌 or class 📚 emoji, event title, time, and location row
- Clock refreshes every 30 seconds via `LaunchedEffect`
- Falls back to a "No more events today 🎉" card when all events are past

**Today's Event List**
- Upcoming events at full opacity, past events at 45% alpha under an "Earlier today" header
- Each row: emoji icon · title · time · location · reminder bell (filled = on, outline = off)

**Quick Add FAB**
- Bottom-right `FloatingActionButton` → navigates to Add/Edit screen

**Notification Status Indicator**
- Bell icon in the header row; taps through to Notification Settings
